summary: ThreeDScene: unit cube rotates about axis (0.6, 0.7, 0.4) via Rodrigues formula + ValueTracker θ_tr through 6 phases to 3π. always_redraw wireframe cube + YELLOW convex-hull shadow polygon onto z=-2 plane. Fixed-frame panel shows θ, instantaneous shadow area, running-average → 1.5 (Cauchy's formula: mean shadow = 1/4 · surface area = 6/4).
